title: Valavisisi va le Yuropa va Kuma Afrika-Dzonga
subject: History
caps_topic: Explorers from Europe find southern Africa

meta.title: Valavisisi va le Yuropa va Kuma Afrika-Dzonga

sources.title: Bartolomeu Dias reaches present Mossel Bay
Portuguese navigator Bartholomew Dias erects the first stone cross on the South African coast
Explorer and navigator Vasco da Gama completes his voyage round the Cape of Good Hope to India
Van Riebeeck lands at the Cape
Jan van Riebeeck, Dutch colonial administrator and first commander of the colony at the Cape of Good Hope, is born

slides.eyebrow: Giredi 6 Matimu - Xiyenge xa le Xikarhi
slides.title: Valavisisi va le Yuropa va Kuma Afrika-Dzonga
slides.lead: Ndlela leyi vafambi va xikepe va Vaputukezi na Vaholandi va fikeke ha yona enhlohlorhini ya Afrika, na leswi mariendzo ya vona yo leha ya vuleke swona eka vanhu lava a se va tshama laha.

media.alt: Xikepe xa timhandzi lexi fambaka ematlangwini ya lwandle ro tshwuka ekusuhi na ribuwa ro rhandza ra Afrika-Dzonga, ehansi ka dyambu leri vonakalaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 118 q40 -10 80 0 t80 0 t80 0 t80 0 v62 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><circle cx='262' cy='42' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M40 118 L64 108 h96 l24 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='108' y='58' width='4' height='60' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M112 60 q40 8 0 46 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M112 60 q-38 8 0 46 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sungula hi ku vutisa swichudeni leswaku 'mulavisisi' i mani, na leswaku ha yini vanhu va khale a va famba hi malwandle lawa a va nga ma tivi. Veka mavonelo mambirhi lamakulu ya dyondzo: (1) vafambi va xikepe va le Portugal kutani va le Holland (Netherlands) va kume ndlela ya lwandle yo rhendzela Afrika-Dzonga, na (2) ku fika ka vona ku cincile vutomi bya Vakhoikhoi na Vasan lava a se va tshama laha. Tsundzuxa swichudeni leswaku ku 'kuma' ndhawu a swi vuli leswaku a yi nga ri na munhu - vanhu a va tshamile laha ku ringana magidi ya malembe.

slides.title: Ha yini Vayuropa a va lava ku famba hi xikepe va ya eDzongeni?
slides.lead: A va lava gondzo ra lwandle leri yisaka eka mabindzu yo fuwa ya le Vuxa.

blocks.text: Khale-khale, swinandziso swa swakudya swo fana na pelepele na sinamoni, swin'we na silika na nsuku, a swi fika eYuropa swi huma eIndia na le Vuxa. A swi famba hi ku nonoka hi le misaveni, hikwalaho a swi **durha** swinene.

items: Tihosi ta le Yuropa a ti lava ndlela yo hatlisa na yo chipa yo fika eVuxa hi lwandle.
Vanhu va le **Portugal** va bohe ku famba va ya eDzongeni va landza ribuwa ra Afrika leswaku va kuma gondzo rero.
A ku hava munhu eYuropa loyi a a ri tiva leswaku swikepe swi nga ha kota ku rhendzela ehansi ka Afrika.

media.alt: Swikwama leswitsongo na tinkalanga ta swinandziso na tibulukoro etlhelo ka swona, swi kombisa swilo swa mabindzu swa risima.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M40 120 q10 -46 30 -46 q20 0 30 46 Z' fill='#8a5a2a'/><path d='M96 120 q9 -40 26 -40 q17 0 26 40 Z' fill='#b5732f'/><ellipse cx='70' cy='76' rx='18' ry='6' fill='#5c3a17'/><ellipse cx='122' cy='82' rx='16' ry='6' fill='#7a4a1f'/><circle cx='168' cy='104' r='14' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='184' cy='112' r='12' fill='#d18f2c'/><circle cx='176' cy='94' r='10' fill='#f0b24a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlayisa mhaka leyi yi ri erivaleni: xivangelo xa mariendzo lawa ya khombo a ku ri mali na mabindzu. Swinandziso a swi tirhisiwa ku nandzihisa na ku hlayisa swakudya, naswona a swi durha ngopfu. Hlamusela leswaku hi nkarhi wolowo Vayuropa a va fanele ku xava swilo swa Vuxa hi ku tirhisa vaxavisi vo tala, leswi a swi endla swi durha - gondzo ro kongoma ra lwandle a ri ta pfumelela Portugal ku xavisa hi voxe. U nga tshiki swichudeni swi tikeriwa hi mavito sweswi; valavisisi va ta ta endzhaku.

slides.eyebrow: Loko swikepe swa ha nga si fika
slides.title: Vanhu lava a se va tshama laha
slides.lead: Afrika-Dzonga a ri ri kaya ra Vakhoikhoi na Vasan khale swinene xikepe xa Yuropa xi nga si fika.

blocks.text: **Vasan** a ku ri vahloti-vahlengeleti lava a va hlota swiharhi va tlhela va hlengeleta swimila. **Vakhoikhoi** a va risa mintlhambi ya tihomu na tinyimpfu naswona a va rhurha ku kuma byanyi lebyintshwa na mati. Loko va hlanganisiwa hi ku talanga va vuriwa **Khoisan**.

items: A va tshamile eAfrika-Dzonga ku ringana magidi ya malembe.
Vakhoikhoi lava a va ri kusuhi na ribuwa va hlangane na vafambi va xikepe vo sungula va Yuropa ximombo hi ximombo.
Tiko leri a ri ri kaya ra vona - a ri nga ri erhala kumbe ku rindzela ku 'kumiwa'.

media.alt: Tihomu timbirhi ti dya byanyi etikweni ro rhandza ekusuhi na ndlu ya byanyi yo rhendzeleka, swi kombisa varisi va Vakhoikhoi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='108' width='240' height='52' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M30 108 q26 -30 52 0 Z' fill='#c8a25a'/><path d='M40 108 v-12 h4 v12 Z' fill='#8a6a34'/><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='150' cy='96' rx='22' ry='12'/><rect x='134' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><rect x='160' y='96' width='4' height='16'/><path d='M130 90 q-6 -6 -2 -10' stroke='#5c3a1f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><ellipse cx='196' cy='104' rx='16' ry='9'/><rect x='185' y='104' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='203' y='104' width='3' height='12'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Xipeji lexi xi na nkoka eka matimu yo lulama na yo tshembeka. Veka erivaleni leswaku vanhu a va tshamile laha nkarhi wo leha hi maendlelo ya vona ya vutomi. Hambanisa hi vulami: Vasan a ku ri vahloti-vahlengeleti, Vakhoikhoi a ku ri varisi va tihomu na tinyimpfu. Rito 'ku kuma' kumbe 'ku fumbarhula' ri tirhisiwa hi mavonelo ya Vayuropa; Vakhoisan a se va ri tiva tiko leri tanihi kaya. Leswi swi veka 'ku hlangana ko sungula' endzhaku.

slides.title: Portugal yi Fambisa Ndlela
slides.lead: Goza hi goza, vafambi va xikepe va Vaputukezi va endla mepe wa ribuwa ra vupeladyambu bya Afrika.

blocks.text: Vafambi va xikepe va le **Portugal** a va famba-nga hinkwaswo hi nkarhi wun'we. Eka riendzo rin'wana na rin'wana a va ya emahlweni switsongo va rhelela ehansi hi ribuwa ra Afrika kutani va vuya ekaya va ta phofula leswi va swi dyondzeke.

items: A va famba hi swikepe swa timhandzi swo tiya leswi vuriwaka **caravels** leswi a swi kota ku famba swi lwisana na moya.
Kaputeni un'wana na un'wana a a engetela ribuwa lerintshwa eka timepe ta Portugal.
Xikongomelo xa vona a xa ha ri ku kuma makumu ya le kule ya Afrika kutani va ya emahlweni eVuxa.

media.alt: Xikepe xa caravel xi ri na timhandzi tinharhu na mapindza layo basa layo tala elwandle.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='220' height='42' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M46 118 L70 106 h84 l22 12 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'><line x1='78' y1='40' x2='78' y2='106'/><line x1='112' y1='30' x2='112' y2='106'/><line x1='146' y1='44' x2='146' y2='106'/></g><path d='M80 44 q26 6 0 40 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M114 34 q30 8 0 48 Z' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M148 48 q22 6 0 36 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='110' y='30' width='16' height='10' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlamusela leswaku ku lavisisa a ku ri endlelo ro nonoka, ro khathala, goza hi goza ehenhla ka malembe yo tala, ku nga ri riendzo rin'we ntsena. Nghenisa caravel: xikepe xo olova, xo hatlisa lexi a xi kota ku famba xi lwisana na moya, leswi a swi endla maendzo yo leha ya lwandle ya koteka. Hlayisa mavito ma nga tali laha - vakaputeni vambirhi lava dumeke (Dias na da Gama) va ta kuma swipeji swa vona endzhaku.

slides.eyebrow: Xana a va nga lahleki hi ndlela yihi?
slides.title: Ku Kuma Ndlela elwandle
slides.lead: Handle ka timepe ta lwandle lerikulu, vafambi va xikepe a va tirhisa dyambu, tinyeleti na switirho swo olova.

blocks.text: Ekule elwandle a ku na tindlela kumbe swikombiso swa tindlela. Valavisisi a va tirhisa **khampasi** ku kuma n'walungwini, naswona a va languta **dyambu na tinyeleti** ku vona laha a va ri kona.

items: Xitirho lexi vuriwaka **astrolabe** a xi pfuna ku pima leswaku dyambu kumbe nyeleti yi tshamile ehenhla ka mpfhuka wihi ematilweni.
Vaputukezi a va byala swihambano leswikulu swa maribye, leswi vuriwaka **padrao**, eribuweni ku kombisa mpfhuka lowu va fikeke eka wona.
Mariendzo a ma ri ni khombo - swihuhuri, ndlala na vuvabyi swi nga ha hlasela ekule na kaya.

media.alt: Khampasi ya xirhendzevutana yi kombisa n'walungwini, etlhelo ka xihambano xa ribye xo leha lexi byariweke eribuweni.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='72' cy='80' r='40' fill='#dcd3c2' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M72 46 L82 80 L72 114 L62 80 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M72 80 L82 80' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'/><text x='72' y='40' font-size='11' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c3f26'>N</text><rect x='150' y='40' width='10' height='84' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='134' y='58' width='42' height='10' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='128' y='120' width='54' height='14' fill='#7a8b5a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lexi i xipeji xo tirha hi mavoko, xa vululami - swichudeni swa Giredi 6 swi tsakela 'ndlela'. Hlamusela hi ku olova leswaku nala wa khampasi minkarhi hinkwayo wu kombetela en'walungwini, naswona ku tlakuka ka dyambu kumbe tinyeleti a swi byela vafambi va xikepe leswaku va ri kule ku fika kwihi en'walungwini kumbe edzongeni. Nghenisa 'padrao' (xihambano xa ribye) hikuva Dias u byale xin'we naswona xi humelela eka xipeji lexi landzelaka. Kandziyisa khombo ra xiviri ku aka xichavo eka ndlela leyi maendzo lawa a ma tika ha yona.

slides.title: Bartolomeu Dias u Rhendzela Kapa
slides.lead: Hi 1488 kaputeni wa Muputukezi u ve Muyuropa wo sungula loyi a tiviwaka ku rhendzela nhlohlori ya Afrika.

blocks.text: **Bartolomeu Dias** u fambe a ya ekule swinene edzongeni lerova xihuhuri xi hungutela swikepe swa yena xi rhendzela ehansi ka Afrika a nga si vona ni misava. A a rhendzele **Kapa**, a kombisa leswaku swikepe swi nga kota ku fika eVuxa hi lwandle.

items: U tsike eMossel Bay kutani a byala xihambano xa ribye eribuweni.
Xosungula u thye ndhawu leyi 'Cape of Storms' (Kapa ra Swihuhuri) hikwalaho ka maxelo yo biha.
Hosi ya Portugal yi tlhele yi yi thya **Cape of Good Hope** (Kapa ra Ntshembo Lowunene), hikuva sweswi a ku ri ni ntshembo wo fika eIndia.

media.alt: Xikepe lexi susumetiwaka hi moya wa matimba na matlangu ku rhendzela kapa ra maribye, ku ri na xihambano xa ribye enhlohlorhini.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='110' width='240' height='50' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M0 110 q30 -14 60 0 t60 0 t60 0 t60 0 v50 H0 Z' fill='#2f5a78'/><path d='M150 110 q40 -30 90 -20 v20 Z' fill='#6b6152'/><rect x='196' y='58' width='7' height='34' fill='#b7a98d'/><rect x='186' y='68' width='27' height='7' fill='#b7a98d'/><path d='M48 108 L68 98 h44 l16 10 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><line x1='84' y1='60' x2='84' y2='98' stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M86 62 q30 8 0 34 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 40 q30 8 60 2' stroke='#9aa77f' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Leri i rin'wana ra maendzo mambirhi ya nkoka ya dyondzo. Kandziyisa 1488 na mianakanyo ya 'wo sungula' hi ku ya hi rhekhodo ra Vayuropa. Hlamusela mhaka hi ku olova: xihuhuri xi rhwale Dias xi n'wi rhendzeta Kapa hi ku fana na hi mbhitsi, leswi swi kombiseke leswaku gondzo ra lwandle a ri koteka. Ku cinca ka vito ku suka eka 'Cape of Storms' ku ya eka 'Cape of Good Hope' i xikombiso xo tsundzukeka - vutisa swichudeni leswaku ha yini 'ntshembo lowunene' a ku ri vito lerinene. [SME] Hi kombela mi tiyisisa marito ya leswaku Dias u tsike eMossel Bay na ku thyiwa ka Kapa mi ma pimanisa na xihloko xa SAHO mi nga si humesa.

slides.title: Vasco da Gama u Fika eIndia
slides.lead: Endzhaku ka malembe ya kwalomu ka khume, kaputeni un'wana wa Muputukezi u fambe a ya eIndia a tlhela a vuya.

blocks.text: **Vasco da Gama** u sungule riendzo hi 1497. Swikepe swa yena swi yime hi ribuwa ra Afrika-Dzonga ku kuma mati lamantshwa na ku wisa, kutani swi tlhela swi tlhandluka hi ribuwa ra vuxa swi tsemakanya swi ya e**India**, leyi a fikeke eka yona hi 1498.

items: U thye ribuwa ra vuxa **Natal**, hikuva u ri hundze kusuhi na Khisimusi.
U pfule gondzo hinkwaro ra lwandle ku suka eYuropa ku ya eVuxa.
Sweswi swikepe swa Vaputukezi a swi hundza Kapa hi ku talanga eendleleni ya swona yo ya xavisa.

media.alt: Mepe wo olova lowu kombisaka gondzo ra xikepe ra timbandi ku suka eYuropa ri rhelela ri rhendzela Afrika ri tsemakanya ri ya eIndia.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#3a6b8a'/><path d='M70 20 q-16 40 8 70 q18 22 0 46 q-6 12 14 12 q26 0 30 -22' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M150 24 q22 30 6 66 q-10 22 8 40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M60 26 C40 60 70 96 78 120 C82 138 120 138 150 120' fill='none' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><circle cx='60' cy='26' r='5' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='150' cy='120' r='5' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='60' y='16' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>Portugal</text><text x='176' y='118' font-size='10' fill='#f4efe6' text-anchor='middle'>India</text></svg>

slides.notes: Riendzo ra vumbirhi ra nkoka. Da Gama u hetise leswi Dias a swi sunguleke: gondzo ro pfuleka ra lwandle ku fika eIndia hinkwaro. Kombisa eka mepe ndlela leyi gondzo ri namarhelaka ha yona ribuwa ra Afrika ri rhendzela Kapa. Hlamusela leswaku 'Natal' swi vula leswi fambelanaka na ku velekiwa/Khisimusi, hi yona mhaka a a ri tirhisa kusuhi na 25 Dizemba. Endzhaku ka leswi, Kapa ri ve xiyimo lexi tolovelekeke xa swikepe leswi hundzaka - leswi swi yisaka eka Vaholandi. [SME] Tiyisisani ku thyiwa ka Natal na masiku ya 1497-1498 mi ma pimanisa na SAHO mi nga si humesa.

slides.title: Ku Hlangana eKapa
slides.lead: Loko vafambi va xikepe na Vakhoikhoi va hlangana, a ku ri ni mabindzu na, minkarhi yin'wana, madzolonga.

blocks.text: Swikepe leswi hundzaka a swi lava mati lamantshwa, nyama na ku wisa. Vafambi va xikepe minkarhi yin'wana a va **xavisa** nsimbi na vuhlalu na Vakhoikhoi va tshurha tihomu na tinyimpfu. Kambe matlhelo mambirhi a ma nga ri na ririmi rin'we, naswona ku nga twisisani ku nga ha hundzuka khombo.

items: Mabindzu ya pfune vafambi va xikepe lava karheleke ku kuma swakudya leswintshwa swa riendzo ro leha.
Hi 1510 ku pfuke nyimpi eTable Bay kutani murhangeri wa Muputukezi na vavanuna vo tala va yena va dlayiwa.
Ku ringana malembe yo tala endzhaku ka sweswo, swikepe swo tala swa Vaputukezi swi hlawurile ku nga yimi eKapa.

media.alt: Mintlawa mimbirhi ya vanhu yi langutane eribuweni, wun'wana wu ri etlhelo ka byatso, va cinceyisa swilo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect y='100' width='240' height='18' fill='#3a6b8a'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='70' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='63' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='98' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='91' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='160' cy='70' r='10'/><rect x='153' y='82' width='14' height='30'/><circle cx='188' cy='72' r='10'/><rect x='181' y='84' width='14' height='28'/></g><rect x='118' y='86' width='6' height='6' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M206 100 q16 -6 30 0 v10 h-30 Z' fill='#5c3f26'/></svg>

slides.notes: Khoma mhaka leyi hi vukheta na hi ku tshembeka eka Giredi 6. Ku hlangana a ku ri na tinhlangano timbirhi: mabindzu yo rhula NA madzolonga. Nyimpi ya 1510 eTable Bay (laha Muputukezi Francisco de Almeida na vavanuna vo tala va feke) hi yona mhaka Vaputukezi va papalateke Kapa endzhaku. Papalata ku sola tlhelo rin'we; hlamusela leswaku ku pfumaleka ka ririmi rin'we na mikhuva yo hambana swi endle ku tshembana ku tika. [SME] Hi kombela mi tiyisisa xiendlakalo xa 1510 xa Table Bay, vito ra murhangeri, na marito ya lava feke mi nga si humesa - hlayisa swi ri swa vukhale bya swichudeni.

slides.title: Vaholandi na VOC
slides.lead: Endzhaku ka malembe yo tlula dzana, vaxavisi va le Netherlands a va lava xiyimo exikarhi eendleleni yo ya eVuxa.

blocks.text: **Dutch East India Company**, leyi tiviwaka hi maletere ya yona ya Xiholandi **VOC**, yi rhumele swikepe swo tala exikarhi ka Yuropa na Vuxa. Kapa a ri ri exikarhi-karhi ka riendzo rero ro leha.

items: Vafambi va xikepe eka maendzo yo leha a va tala ku vabya handle ka swakudya leswintshwa na mati.
VOC a yi lava **refreshment station** (xitichi xo phamela vafambi) eKapa ku byala matsavu na ku kuma nyama leyintshwa.
Kutani Khampani yi bohe ku rhuma vanhu ku aka xisekelo eTable Bay.

media.alt: Mujeko wa xikepe xa mabindzu etlhelo ka tibokisi na tibulukoro, swi kombisa ndhawu ya mabindzu ya khampani.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='40' y='30' width='6' height='100' fill='#5c3f26'/><path d='M46 32 h60 v34 h-60 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='76' y='55' font-size='16' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c1414'>VOC</text><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='120' y='96' width='36' height='34'/><rect x='158' y='104' width='30' height='26'/></g><g stroke='#5c3f26' stroke-width='2'><line x1='120' y1='113' x2='156' y2='113'/><line x1='138' y1='96' x2='138' y2='130'/></g><ellipse cx='176' cy='104' rx='15' ry='6' fill='#8a6a34'/></svg>

slides.notes: Buriso ku suka eka Vaputukezi ku ya eka Vaholandi. Kandziyisa xivangelo: VOC a yi ri khampani leyikulu ya mabindzu leyi swikepe swa yona a swi teka tin'hweti ku fika eVuxa, naswona vafambi va xikepe a va vabya (hi ku tala hi scurvy, hi ku pfumala swakudya leswintshwa). Refreshment station exikarhi eKapa a yi ta nyika matsavu lamantshwa, mati na nyama. Hi yona mhaka Vaholandi va teke - mabindzu na ku phamela, ku nga ri xosungula ku aka tiko.

slides.title: Jan van Riebeeck eKapa
slides.lead: Hi 1652 VOC yi rhume Jan van Riebeeck ku ya veka refreshment station.

blocks.text: **Jan van Riebeeck** u fike eTable Bay hi April 1652 na ntlawa lowutsongo wa vanhu. Va ake khokholo ku tikhotsa naswona va byala ntanga lowukulu wa matsavu ku phamela swikepe leswi hundzaka.

items: Va byale matsavu na mihandzu naswona va risa swifuwo ku kuma nyama leyintshwa.
Va xavisile na Vakhoikhoi va kuma tihomu na tinyimpfu.
Xitichi lexitsongo lexi xi kule hakatsongo-tsongo - xi ve masungulo ya vutshamo lebyi tiyeke bya Vayuropa.

media.alt: Khokholo ro fana na nyeleti etlhelo ka mitsanana yo lulama ya ntanga wa matsavu ehansi ka ntshava yo ba xitsanana.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M20 60 h120 l16 -22 h44 v42 H20 Z' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#3f6b45' stroke-width='3'><line x1='30' y1='108' x2='150' y2='108'/><line x1='30' y1='122' x2='150' y2='122'/><line x1='30' y1='136' x2='150' y2='136'/></g><path d='M176 104 l14 -8 l14 8 l-4 22 h-20 Z' fill='#c8b89a' stroke='#8a6a34' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='186' y='114' width='8' height='12' fill='#7a5a3a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lexi i xiave xo hundzuka eka xiphemu xa vumbirhi xa dyondzo. Van Riebeeck u fike hi April 1652 na kwalomu ka vanhu va 90; va ake khokholo na Ntanga wa Khampani ku phamela swikepe. Kandziyisa xiga xa 'vutshamo lebyi tiyeke' - ku hambana na Vaputukezi lava a va yima ntsena, Vaholandi va sale. Ku tiya kokolo hi swona swi endlaka 1652 ri va ra nkoka naswona swi yisa eka vuyelo bya xipeji lexi landzelaka. [SME] Tiyisisani n'hweti ya ku fika na ntsengo wa ntlawa wa van Riebeeck (hi ku tala wu nyikiwa tanihi kwalomu ka 90) mi nga si humesa.

slides.eyebrow: Leswi swi vuleke swona eka Vakhoikhoi
slides.title: Ku Cinca eka Vanhu va Kapa
slides.lead: Vutshamo lebyintshwa byi teke misava na madyelo hakatsongo-tsongo leswi Vakhoikhoi a va titshega ha swona.

blocks.text: Xosungula Vaholandi na Vakhoikhoi a va xavisana. Kambe loko vutshamo byi ri karhi byi kula, Vaholandi a va lava **misava yo tala** ya mapurasi - misava yoleyo Vakhoikhoi a va yi tirhisa ku risa tihomu ta vona.

items: Vakhoikhoi va lahlekeriwe hi misava yo risela naswona, hi ku famba ka nkarhi, va lahlekeriwe hi tihomu to tala ta vona.
Ku nga pfumelelani ehenhla ka misava na tihomu swi tise nyimpi exikarhi ka matlhelo mambirhi.
Vutomi bya Vakhoikhoi na Vasan byi cinciwe hilaha ku nga heriki hi vutshamo bya le Kapa.

media.alt: Nsungi wu avanyisa tiko ro rhandza ro risela, ku ri na tihomu etlhelo rin'we na yindlu ya purasi etlhelo rin'wana.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='96' width='240' height='64' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g stroke='#6b6152' stroke-width='3'><line x1='120' y1='60' x2='120' y2='150'/><line x1='104' y1='84' x2='136' y2='84'/><line x1='104' y1='104' x2='136' y2='104'/></g><g fill='#5c3a1f'><ellipse cx='56' cy='112' rx='18' ry='9'/><rect x='44' y='112' width='3' height='12'/><rect x='66' y='112' width='3' height='12'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='168' y='96' width='40' height='30'/></g><path d='M166 96 l22 -16 l22 16 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Humesa vuyelo lebyikulu hi ku olova na hi ku lulama. Vuxaka byi sungule hi mabindzu kambe byi cincile loko vatshami va ri karhi va lava misava ya purasi - yoleyo madyelo lawa Vakhoikhoi a va ma lava eka mintlhambi ya vona. Leswi swi tise ku lahlekeriwa hi misava, ku lahlekeriwa hi tihomu, na madzolonga. Hlayisa swi ri swa xiviri na swa vukhale bya swichudeni; mhaka hi leswaku ku fika ka vutshamo ku cincile vutomi bya Vakhoikhoi na Vasan hilaha ku nga heriki. Leswi swi hlanganisa na tinhloko ta CAPS ta le ndzhaku ta ku thoriwa ka Kapa.

slides.title: Masiku ya nkoka: 1488 ku ya 1652

blocks.alt: Nkarhinkarhi ku suka 1488 ku ya 1652 lowu kombisaka Dias a rhendzela Kapa, da Gama a fika eIndia, ku lwa ka 1510 eTable Bay, na van Riebeeck a fika hi 1652.

events.label: Vasco da Gama u ya emahlweni eIndia
Ku lwa na Vakhoikhoi eTable Bay
Swikepe swa VOC ya Vaholandi swi hundza Kapa hi ku talanga
Van Riebeeck u sungula refreshment station

slides.notes: Tirhisa xipeji lexi ku pfuna swichudeni ku landzelelanisa swiendlakalo, vuswikoti bya nkoka bya CAPS Intermediate Phase. Va kombele va xiya nkarhi wo leha exikarhi ka maendzo yo sungula ya Vaputukezi (eku heleni ka va-1400) na vutshamo bya Vaholandi (1652) - ku tlula malembe ya 150. Vaputukezi va kume va tlhela va tirhisa gondzo ra lwandle; Vaholandi hi vona lava eku heteleleni va tshameke eKapa.

slides.eyebrow: Ha yini swi ri na nkoka
slides.title: Matlhelo Mambirhi ya Ntsheketo Wun'we
slides.lead: Maendzo yaleyo ya languteka hi ndlela yo hambana swinene hi ku ya hi leswaku u mani.

items: Gondzo ra lwandle leri yaka eka rifuwo ra Vuxa ri pfuriwile.
Mabindzu na swikepe swi kule, naswona Kapa ri ve xiyimo xa nkoka.
Vaholandi va ake xisekelo lexi tshamaka enhlohlorhini ya Afrika.
Valuveri va fike etikweni leri a se ri ri kaya ra vona.
Va lahlekeriwe hi misava yo risela na tihomu loko vutshamo byi ri karhi byi kula.
Ndlela ya vona ya vutomi yi cinciwe hilaha ku nga heriki.

slides.notes: Lexi i xipeji xo anakanya. Dyondzisa 'mavonelo' - matimu yaleyo ma titwa ku fana na ku humelela lokutsakisaka eka tlhelo ra Yuropa naswona ku fana na ku lahlekeriwa eka tlhelo ra Vakhoisan. Khutaza swichudeni ku khoma tintiyiso timbirhi hi nkarhi wun'we. Leswi swi kombisa ku anakanya ka matimu ko ringanela naswona swi va lunghiselela eka swivutiso swo kambela.

slides.title: Leswi hi swi dyondzeke
slides.lead: Vafambi va xikepe va Vaputukezi va kume gondzo ra lwandle ku rhendzela Afrika-Dzonga, naswona Vaholandi endzhaku va tshame eKapa - va cinca vutomi bya Vakhoisan.

blocks.text: Tsundzuka ntsheketo: Vayuropa a va lava gondzo ra lwandle ku ya eVuxa; **Dias** u rhendzele Kapa hi 1488 naswona **da Gama** u fike eIndia hi 1498; naswona hi **1652 van Riebeeck** u ake refreshment station leyi kuleke yi va vutshamo lebyi tshamaka.

blocks.question: Ha yini Vaputukezi a va lava ku rhendzela nhlohlori ya Afrika?
Boxa valavisisi vambirhi va Vaputukezi lava dumeke eka dyondzo leyi kutani u vula leswi un'wana na un'wana a swi endleke.
Ku fika ka vutshamo bya Vaholandi eKapa ku cince vutomi bya Vakhoikhoi hi ndlela yihi?

slides.notes: Gimeta hi ku vuyelela swiyimo swinharhu swa nkoka: Dias (1488), da Gama (1497-98) na van Riebeeck (1652). Tirhisa swivutiso swinharhu tanihi ntirho wo tsariwa kumbe mbulavurisano wa tlilasi; mimaki yi landza xitayela xa CAPS. Xivutiso xo hetelela xi kambela leswaku swichudeni swi kota ku hlamusela vuyelo, ku nga ri ku tsundzuka fakiti ntsena. Kombisa yunithi leyi landzelaka: ku thoriwa ka Kapa hi malembe-dzana ya vu-17 na vu-18.
